zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Stapleton於大約1397年出生在英國諾福爾可英厄姆時，她的父親Sir Brian Stapleton19歲，母親Cecily Bardolph19歲。她於1422年與Sir Thomas Heath在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在英國素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Stapleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleton (in Devon, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Herefordshire, Shropshire, Leicestershire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Cumberland), all named in Old English with stapol ‘post, pillar’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The name is common in Ireland, where it has been established since medieval times in the counties of Tipperary and Kilkenny.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Stapleton was born about 1397, in Ingham, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir Brian Stapleton, was 19 and her mother, Cecily Bardolph, was 19. She married Sir Thomas Heath in 1422, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in Suffolk, England.

Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Heath en 1422, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Suffolk, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Stapletonが約1397年にイギリスノーフォルクインガムで生まれた時，父Sir Brian Stapletonは19歳，母Cecily Bardolphは19歳であった。1422年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでSir Thomas Heathと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリススフォルクで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Stapleton(이)가 대략 1397년 영국 노르폴크 잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Brian Stapleton(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily Bardolph(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1422년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Sir Thomas Heath(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 수폴크에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Stapleton родилась около 1397 г. в местности ингхам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Brian Stapleton было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Bardolph, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Heath в 1422 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности суффолк, Англия.
